title: The Lowest Place
content:
Give me the lowest place: not that I dare
        Ask for that lowest place, but Thou hast died
    That I might live and share
        Thy glory by Thy side.

    Give me the lowest place: or if for me
        That lowest place too high, make one more low
    Where I may sit and see
        My God and love Thee so.
meaning: About: Christina Georgina Rossetti was a British poet, who wrote a variety of romantic, devotional, and children's poems. She is best known for her long poem Goblin Market, her love poem "Remember", and for her Christmas poem "In the Bleak Midwinter".
